name: Recover approved outputs and reconcile Git state

elements.name: Recovery scope aligned
elements.documentation: The operator approved delivery of the three local outputs and removal of the enumerated stale Git state.

elements.name: Revalidate Git inventory
elements.documentation: Confirm the approved recovery files remain intact and every cleanup target still satisfies its safety precondition.

elements.name: Create isolated recovery Change
elements.documentation: Fetch origin and create a Herdr-managed worktree from explicit origin/main, then transfer the approved outputs and planning records.

elements.name: Enter verification
elements.documentation: Merge the initial implementation path and any bounded review-fix loop before rerunning verification.

elements.name: Run recovery checks
elements.documentation: Verify content equivalence, document structure, TOML parsing, Task/plan linkage, diff hygiene, and recovery independence from the primary checkout.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Delegate one read-only review of the exact uncommitted Change after local checks.

elements.name: Change green?
elements.documentation: Only a locally verified Change with no confirmed material findings may be committed.

elements.name: Fix confirmed in-scope findings
elements.documentation: Apply only the smallest causal corrections within the approved boundary, then rerun affected checks and review the delta.

elements.name: Commit, push, and open PR
elements.documentation: Commit the green recovery unit, push it, and open one pull request carrying intent and check evidence.

elements.name: Prove remote preservation
elements.documentation: Confirm the pushed branch and pull request contain every approved output before deleting any local recovery source.

elements.name: Recovery safely represented?
elements.documentation: Cleanup may proceed only when the approved content is independently recoverable from committed and pushed Git state.

elements.name: Cleanup blocked
elements.documentation: Stop without deleting local state when remote preservation cannot be proven.

elements.name: Remove obsolete local Git state
elements.documentation: Clean and synchronize primary main; remove six merged worktrees and branches, three superseded stashes, and all historical WIP refs; do not rescue 8ed35f2.

elements.name: Verify final Git invariants
elements.documentation: Freshly check worktree count and cleanliness, local branch containment, stash/WIP absence, main synchronization, remote recovery branch, and orphan non-preservation.

elements.name: Finalize Task and PR checks
elements.documentation: Record acceptance evidence, mark the Task Done inside the same Change, push finalization, and pass applicable GitHub checks.

elements.name: Enter operator disposition
elements.documentation: Merge the initial handoff and any later resume before checking the pull request's current disposition.

elements.name: Operator reviews PR
elements.documentation: Present the durable pull-request page; the operator alone decides whether and when to merge.

elements.name: PR disposition?
elements.documentation: A merged or rejected pull request determines the terminal path; a still-open pull request pauses for later operator disposition.

elements.name: Await later operator disposition
elements.documentation: The green pull request remains open until the operator merges, rejects, or resumes the delivery check.

elements.name: Change rejected
elements.documentation: Report the rejection and realign without silently replacing the Task or expanding intent.

elements.name: Synchronize primary main after merge
elements.documentation: Fetch the landed pull request and fast-forward the clean primary checkout so the recovered outputs, including the live Herdr setting, are present on main.

elements.name: Verify landing and record conformance
elements.documentation: After merge, verify landed state, account for every plan node, and append the conformance report to the plan document.

elements.name: Outputs live and Git reconciled
elements.documentation: The approved outputs are landed, local Git state is clean, and plan conformance is recorded.
